docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-29-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 02

JUDGE GEORGE T CHOPPELAS, M BRADY, REPORTER, ASAUSA, CLERK 9:35AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT SHIRLEY A STONICH AKA SHIRLEY ANN STONICH. CASE SETTLED. TERMS STATED ON RECORD. STIPULATED BETWEEN PARTIES PLAINTIFF HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANTS FOR $18,926.09 PRINCIPAL, $8,841.12 INTEREST, $2,225.00 ATTY FEES, $164.50 COSTS. JUDGMENT MAY ENTER IMMEDIATELY. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO DEFENDANT FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
